label: PASS
rationale: Locking RangeStart is specified as a uinteger_8 and defines an LBA start value; CreateRow must validate the specified RangeStart/RangeLength values. A boolean token for RangeStart is not a numeric uinteger value, so INVALID_PARAMETER is protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Locking RangeStart is a uinteger_8 LBA value, and CreateRow must validate RangeStart/RangeLength inputs. Accepting boolean true as RangeStart treats a boolean token as a uinteger, which is not supported by the supplied evidence.

label: PASS
rationale: Locking RangeLength is specified as a uinteger_8 and defines a quantity of contiguous LBAs; CreateRow must validate the specified RangeStart/RangeLength values. A boolean token for RangeLength is not a numeric uinteger value, so INVALID_PARAMETER is protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Locking RangeLength is a uinteger_8 LBA count, and CreateRow must validate RangeStart/RangeLength inputs. Accepting boolean false as RangeLength treats a boolean token as a uinteger, which is not supported by the supplied evidence.

label: PASS
rationale: RangeStart is a uinteger_8 LBA value, and Set on a non-Global Locking row is subject to the same constraints and checks used when Locking rows are created. Rejecting boolean false for RangeStart as INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: RangeStart is specified as a uinteger_8 LBA value, and Set on a non-Global Locking row inherits the creation constraints and checks. Succeeding with boolean false as RangeStart accepts a boolean token where a uinteger value is required.
